issues_found: [{"title":"Protected-token lint enforces retired project-local knowledge tokens","severity":"medium","evidence":"scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts:38 requires .fabric/knowledge/ in every SKILL.md; scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts:86 requires .fabric/agents.meta.json in the registry; .github/workflows/ci.yml:48 and .github/workflows/release.yml:48 run this gate.","root_cause":"The quality gate encodes obsolete project-local knowledge paths as mandatory protected tokens, which is distinct from existing issues about stale skill text or manifest input paths and can block store-only cleanup."}]
